_comment: Extraction accuracy gold set. Each line is one manually annotated sample. expected maps ordinal dimensions to int or null; null means no stance. SEED rows are only harness smoke tests. Real gold labels must be human-authored by Chen, not generated by a model.

body: 文章提示央行态度已发生变化，后续关注银行间资金利率是否超预期波动。
note: SEED: rules-mvp-v1 should produce monetary=-1 and growth=null.

body: 本周市场以震荡为主，节后流动性平稳，暂无明确方向性信号。
note: SEED: weak-signal text for null-discipline checks.
